calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Cole Heggi, Esq. of Homan & Stone, T:909.307.9380, for defendant/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS PV HOLDING CORP. AND SHEILA PERRY'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS OF DEPONENTS MIGUEL DIAZ AND WAI NG is GRANTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco has not shown that either Mr. Diaz or Mr. Ng has a protecible privacy interest in information about prior similar accidents that supports either an instruction not to answer on privacy grounds or requires moving defendants to show that prior similar accidents are directly relevant to the issues in this case. Absent such a privacy interest, the instructions not to answer questions were erroneous and thus the City is required to make Mr. Diaz and Mr. Ng available for further sessions of their depositions where they are required to answer questions seeking information about prior similar accidents.

Counsel for the moving defendants to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
